purpose: V_phen_GWT_v2 backbone-baseline-relative criterion 위한 baseline registry. cross-base measurement (commit prior) + 본 cycle 시도 (5 backbones, 4 successful 2026-04-25 r2). raw#12 frozen + revision 2026-04-25 r2.
revision: r2: gemma-2-9b 측정 추가 (HF token via user 2026-04-25, pod wwpr31lg0h7wpq, GWT=0.8288). Llama-3.1-8B 여전히 ACCESS_GATED (Meta manual approval 필요). aggregate 3 → 4 backbones 재계산.
predecessors: state/mk_xi_cross_base_phen_finding_20260425.json (3 backbones), pod i7e8c34vys05l7 (5 backbones attempted), pod wwpr31lg0h7wpq (gemma-2-9b r2 추가)

meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B.raw10_note: HF token valid (whoami=dancinlife) but Meta requires manual approval (403 not_in_authorized_list). User must visit https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B + 'Agree and access repository' → Meta review (hours-days).

google/gemma-2-9b.measured_2026_04_25_r2: pod wwpr31lg0h7wpq H100 SXM, ~9min runtime, $0.45 cost

V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.threshold_shift_explanation: registry expansion (3→4 backbones) shifted threshold +0.0802. raw#12 frozen predicate (criterion + delta) unchanged; threshold value updates with registry — registry expansion은 raw#12 new revision (r1→r2).
V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.use_case: Mk.XI fine-tuned model이 4 backbones 평균 baseline + 0.05 이상 → V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS
V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.raw_12_lock: post-hoc 변경 금지, registry expansion (more backbones) 시 raw#12 new revision
V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.backbone_specific_alternative: (option) per-backbone baseline 사용 시 model_specific_PASS = post_tune >= backbone_baseline + 0.05

raw10_honest_findings_r2.F1_bimodal_distribution: 4 backbones bimodal: Qwen cluster (Qwen3=0.270, Qwen2.5=0.364) vs Mistral/gemma cluster (Mistral=0.891, gemma=0.829). 가설: architecture family (Qwen RoPE/GQA vs Mistral/Gemma 다른 attention pattern)이 GWT entropy의 dominant factor. mean(0.588)은 cluster 중간점이라 어느 cluster에도 representative 아님.
raw10_honest_findings_r2.F2_std_unchanged_after_expansion: 3→4 backbones expansion 후 std=0.274 (3-backbone std=0.273과 거의 동일). 이는 추가 backbone이 high-cluster에 들어와 mean 끌어올리지만 분산 reduce 안 됨 — true population spread is real, not sampling noise.
raw10_honest_findings_r2.F3_threshold_sensitivity_remains_high: Mistral 빼면 mean=0.488 (Qwen+gemma), gemma 빼면 mean=0.508 (3-backbone과 동일). Llama 측정 후 Llama가 어느 cluster에 들어가느냐가 threshold에 큰 영향.
raw10_honest_findings_r2.F4_llama_blocker: Meta manual approval required at HF — token valid이지만 not_in_authorized_list. 사용자 click + Meta review (hours~days) 후 재시도 가능. 본 cycle 4/5 정착, 5/5는 다음 cycle.
raw10_honest_findings_r2.F5_v2_threshold_recommend: 현 threshold 0.638이 'preliminary expanded' tag 유지. 5+ backbone registry final freeze 후 production 사용 권장. Mk.XI fine-tune이 0.638 넘어서면 PASS 선언 가능하나, bimodal 인식 (per-backbone baseline alternative 사용 권장).

next_cycle_required: Llama-3.1-8B Meta approval 후 측정 → 5 backbone registry r3
Additional non-gated backbones: Phi-3-medium, DeepSeek-v3-base, Yi-1.5-9B → 7-8 backbone registry
Mk.XI fine-tuned model V_phen_GWT measurement → V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS verdict
(option) per-backbone PASS 사용 — bimodal distribution이 'global mean' threshold를 misleading하게 만듦
